summary: Adventure chunk from Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera page 123, chunk 4.

source_text.source_title: Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera

mechanics.raw_text:
15, Button: When pushed in, the forward guns, fire, Press again to disengage firing, (P12 damage; ~3 on vehicle armed weapons skill roll to hit) If the armored canopy is up, the PCs won't see what's happening, though they'll hear a “budda-budda-budda” sound. ‘Magazines hold lots and lots of rounds, but 
who knows whether anyone remembered to load them? Thus, the guns work when you ‘want them to (when PCs fire them acciden- tally) and run out of ammo when they might actually be useful 
16. Glove Compartment: Service and inspec tion access to Lucky's brain. Pretty damp in here because ofthe leak, but Lucky'll be okay ‘once he gets out of the water and dries out 
17, Slide Control: For propeliers: left to mid- dle to right ~ reverse to neutral to forward. For overland travel, sequence is reversed. (Must be a wire mixed up.) 1B, Slide Control: Five positions, from left to right, Emergency Full, Full, TwolThirds, One/Third, Stop. Tends to get stuck on Emergency Full, Of caurse, 19, Slide Control: Cabin lights. Three posi- tions from left to right: Full Normal Light, Lights Off, Full Red Night Lights.” 
20, Switch: Stars in middle position; spring relums it to middle position when released. Push up, blows ballast and causes MTV to sur face, Push down, takes on ballast and MTV sinks, When Lucky snaps out, ballast is full Note: MTV cannot rise on overland legs while ballast is full 21. Switch: Waming flashes on display cree "WARNING: SELF-DESTRUCT SEQUENCE IS NOW IN PROGRESS. TO DISENGAGE SELF- DESTRUCT, FOLLOW STANDARD PRO- ‘CEDURES, THANK YOU,” Brief silence. Then over loud speakers, "SIXTY, FIFTY- NINE.
